lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to size the economy cabin suite, shield and FSD for the passenger fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-7 Transporter ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout and passenger-cabin module sizes underpinning the loadout and economy berth count.

sources.label: Inara — Type-7 Transporter
sources.what: Hull stats, base shield/armour, and shipyard pricing backing the passenger cost figures.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Type-7 Transporter
sources.what: Hull role, manufacturer background, and internal layout supporting the passenger write-up.
